published_title_visible: 17. Harry Leary Devalued His Personal Gains - “I can’t imagine being in the mind of Harry Leary”
published_title_evidence_status: transcribed from supplied YouTube Studio screenshot; an ellipsis marks visible UI truncation where present
working_source_title: Fireside BMX Chat w/ Greg Mathias - Harry Leary devalued many of his personal gains
working_source_description: Harry Leary devalued many of his personal gains because. The riders were told to give the “schwag” away to promote the brand. He ended up keeping very little and holding very little to value. He had a locker in Lake Havasu that was sold off because he wasn’t paying for the unit. Greg never had Harry sign anything, even though he had given him things over the years - he thought he would be around forever.
frame_mapping_basis: chronological order of the 32 supplied published-frame captures, aligned to the Studio register that omits 10 and contains two distinct records numbered 12
transcript_status: No standalone Short transcript was supplied. The timestamp range is a provisional access reference into the supplied parent machine transcript and requires audiovisual verification.
